location: Inside a chest at the top of Rabbath's Rise, a glintstone tower — requires breaking a hidden wall in the study (marked by two arches) to reveal a Spiritspring, then riding Torrent up the wind current to the peak.
region: Scadu Altus (Realm of Shadow, Shadow of the Erdtree DLC)
tactics: From Church District Highroad grace, head east to the tower (or approach from Bonny Village, crossing two bridges northeast)
Enter via the left door and climb the spiral stairs to the study room
Strike the wall segment with two arches to reveal a hidden Spiritspring
Exit onto the balcony, use the Spiritspring jump, then carefully follow the exterior stairs up to the chest — no boss fight, pure platforming/puzzle
lore: Credited to a named 'Spellmachinist,' this cannon embeds glintstones around its barrel that add magic damage to its bolts and give them a homing pull toward locked-on targets — a more refined, magic-augmented cousin of the cruder Jar Cannon.

builds.name: Any build (utility)
builds.why: Zero stat scaling; its bolts home in on a locked-on target and split physical/magic damage, useful against flying/fast enemies or high-physical-resist foes in any build
